entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on rural labour markets and MGNREGA is focused

entities.name: NATIONAL ECONOMY
entities.description: The overall economic system of India, which has grown rapidly over the last two decades

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT LEVEL
entities.description: The extent of job availability and employment growth within the economy

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of economic hardship that employment growth aims to reduce

entities.name: WELFARE PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Government initiatives designed to provide social and economic support to the population

entities.name: MGNREGA
entities.description: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, a social security measure providing a right to work

entities.name: DAYS OF EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: A basic entitlement under MGNREGA referring to the guaranteed number of working days

entities.name: WAGES
entities.description: The payment made to workers for their labor, a basic entitlement under MGNREGA

entities.name: EARNINGS
entities.description: The total money earned by individuals, a basic entitlement under MGNREGA

entities.name: SOCIAL GROUPS
entities.description: Demographic categories including dalits, adivasis, women, and vulnerable groups

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WAGES
entities.description: Wages paid specifically for labor in the agricultural sector

entities.name: POOR COMMUNITY
entities.description: The socio-economic group that has been considerably impacted by MGNREGA

entities.name: FEMALE AGRICULTURE WAGES
entities.description: Wages earned by women working in the agricultural sector

entities.name: MALE-FEMALE WAGE GAP
entities.description: The difference in wages between male and female agricultural workers

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LABOUR MARKETS
entities.description: The market system where agricultural labor is supplied and demanded

entities.name: LABOUR SHORTAGE
entities.description: A situation where there are not enough workers to fill available agricultural jobs

entities.name: WAGE STRUCTURES
entities.description: The system of wage levels and differentials within the labour market

entities.name: DISTRESS MIGRATION
entities.description: Migration forced by poverty or lack of local employment opportunities

entities.name: MECHANIZATION PROCESS
entities.description: The introduction of machinery to replace manual labor in agriculture

entities.name: PEAK SEASON ADJUSTMENT OF WORK
entities.description: The modification of work schedules to accommodate peak agricultural demand

entities.name: MGNREGA CALENDAR
entities.description: The scheduling tool used for the implementation of MGNREGA

relationships.description: Growth in the national economy has not been commensurate with growth in employment level
Employment growth is important to reduce poverty
MGNREGA is a specific implementation of welfare programmes in India
MGNREGA provides basic entitlements for days of employment
MGNREGA provides basic entitlements for wages
MGNREGA provides basic entitlements for earnings
MGNREGA aims to cover social groups like dalits, adivasis, and women
MGNREGA has a considerable impact on agricultural wages
MGNREGA has a considerable impact on the poor community
MGNREGA contributed to a steep increase in female agriculture wages
MGNREGA contributed to a substantive decline in the male-female wage gap
MGNREGA impacts the dynamics of agricultural labour markets
MGNREGA leads to evidence of labour shortage
MGNREGA leads to changes in wage structures
MGNREGA leads to reduced distress migration
MGNREGA leads to speeding up the mechanization process
MGNREGA leads to peak season adjustment of work
MGNREGA is implemented using an MGNREGA calendar
